tool.name: Heatmap

param.name: input1
param.label: Input file:
param.help: Enter the matrix with the counts of common elements

param.name: input2
param.label: Input file:
param.help: Enter the matrix with the counts of common elements names/ids

param.name: threshold
param.label: Count threshold
param.help: Threshold indicating which counts filter. If an element have a number of common objects that is less than the threshold between all other elements, it will be removed from the final matrix

param.name: x_label
param.label: x axis label:
param.help: Label to be used for x axis in the plot

param.name: y_label
param.label: y axis label:
param.help: Label to be used for y axis in the plot

tool.help:
**What it does**
Given a matrix with counts of common elements and one with the names/ids, the tools retrieves the corresponding heatmap. The diagonal is set to Nan in order to have a better and more precise representation of the counts. If a threshold is given, all elements having a number of common objects less than the threshold with all the other elements, it will be removed from the result. Names for the axis in the heatmap are optional, by default no labels are used.
